name: devfolio
description: Prepare, validate, preview, and safely publish Devfolio hackathon submissions from Codex.

interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to Devfolio workflows through the OAuth-enabled Devfolio MCP server. Without an MCP connection, Codex can help inspect public hackathons and prepare local submission copy. With Devfolio MCP connected, Codex can view active hackathons, fetch submission guides, manage project drafts, upload images, and safely create, update, or publish projects after confirmation.
